SUCCESS 
     1→'use strict';
     2→/**
     3→ * REGRESSION — FRG-246
     4→ * Objects change sprite when state transitions.
     5→ *
     6→ * Tests run against the local dev server (http://localhost:5176) which serves
     7→ * the master branch of the source repository.
     8→ *
     9→ * window._gameEngine is set unconditionally in scene.js create() — no route
    10→ * injection needed.
    11→ *
    12→ * Key implementation under test:
    13→ *   - OBJECT_DEFS in src/objects.js: stove, tea_set, bookshelf, easel have spriteMap
    14→ *   - ObjectInstance.interact() returns { spriteKey } matching the new state's entry
    15→ *   - ObjectInstance.tick()     returns { spriteKey } on auto-transition
    16→ *   - scene.js creates this._objectSprites[id] images (depth=1, origin(0,0))
    17→ *   - scene.update() swaps texture via setTexture(ev.spriteKey) from pendingEvents
    18→ *
    19→ * spriteMap definitions:
    20→ *   stove:     { idle: 'stove_off',    cooking: 'stove_on',        done: 'stove_on'        }
    21→ *   tea_set:   { idle: 'cup_empty',    brewing: 'cup_full',        ready: 'cup_full'       }
    22→ *   bookshelf: { idle: 'book_closed',  reading: 'book_open'                                }
    23→ *   easel:     { idle: 'easel_blank',  painting: 'easel_painting', done: 'easel_finished'  }
    24→ *
    25→ * Test layout:
    26→ *   1. spriteMap defined on stove, tea_set, bookshelf, easel — correct keys and idle sprites
    27→ *   2. interact() returns spriteKey matching new state; null for objects without spriteMap
    28→ *   3. tick() auto-transition returns correct spriteKey
    29→ *   4. Scene creates _objectSprites with depth=1 and origin(0,0), initial texture = idle sprite
    30→ *   5. Sprite texture swaps on interact event; swaps back to idle on return transition
    31→ */
    32→const { test, expect } = require('@playwright/test');
    33→
    34→const LOCAL_URL = 'http://localhost:5176';
    35→
    36→// ── helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    37→
    38→/**
    39→ * Wait for the SimulationEngine to be fully initialised with 3 characters.
    40→ */
    41→async function waitForEngine(page) {
    42→  await page.waitForFunction(
    43→    () => window._gameEngine?.characters?.length === 3,
    44→    { timeout: 15_000 }
    45→  );
    46→}
    47→
    48→/**
    49→ * Intercept scene.js to inject window._gameScene = this inside create().
    50→ * This lets tests access _objectSprites from the CafeScene instance.
    51→ */
    52→async function injectSceneExposure(page) {
    53→  await page.route('**/scene.js*', async (route) => {
    54→    const response = await route.fetch();
    55→    let body = await response.text();
    56→    body = body.replace(
    57→      'window._gameEngine = this.engine;',
    58→      'window._gameEngine = this.engine;
    window._gameScene = this;'
    59→    );
    60→    await route.fulfill({ response, body });
    61→  });
    62→}
    63→
    64→// ── Tests ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    65→
    66→test.describe('FRG-246: Object Sprite Swap on State Transition', () => {
    67→
    68→  // ── TEST 1: spriteMap defined on all 4 mapped objects ────────────────────────
    69→
    70→  test('spriteMap is defined on stove, tea_set, bookshelf, and easel with correct entries', async ({ page }) => {
    71→    test.setTimeout(30_000);
    72→
    73→    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);
    74→    await waitForEngine(page);
    75→
    76→    const results = await page.evaluate(() => {
    77→      const engine = window._gameEngine;
    78→      const objects = engine.objectEngine.getAll();
    79→      const byId = {};
    80→      for (const o of objects) byId[o.id] = o;
    81→
    82→      return {
    83→        stove: {
    84→          hasSpriteMap:  byId.stove?.spriteMap != null,
    85→          idle:          byId.stove?.spriteMap?.idle,
    86→          cooking:       byId.stove?.spriteMap?.cooking,
    87→          done:          byId.stove?.spriteMap?.done,
    88→        },
    89→        tea_set: {
    90→          hasSpriteMap:  byId.tea_set?.spriteMap != null,
    91→          idle:          byId.tea_set?.spriteMap?.idle,
    92→          brewing:       byId.tea_set?.spriteMap?.brewing,
    93→          ready:         byId.tea_set?.spriteMap?.ready,
    94→        },
    95→        bookshelf: {
    96→          hasSpriteMap:  byId.bookshelf?.spriteMap != null,
    97→          idle:          byId.bookshelf?.spriteMap?.idle,
    98→          reading:       byId.bookshelf?.spriteMap?.reading,
    99→        },
   100→        easel: {
   101→          hasSpriteMap:  byId.easel?.spriteMap != null,
   102→          idle:          byId.easel?.spriteMap?.idle,
   103→          painting:      byId.easel?.spriteMap?.painting,
   104→          done:          byId.easel?.spriteMap?.done,
   105→        },
   106→        // Objects without a spriteMap
   107→        fridge: {
   108→          hasSpriteMap:  byId.fridge?.spriteMap != null,
   109→        },
   110→        kotatsu: {
   111→          hasSpriteMap:  byId.kotatsu?.spriteMap != null,
   112→        },
   113→        bonsai: {
   114→          hasSpriteMap:  byId.bonsai?.spriteMap != null,
   115→        },
   116→      };
   117→    });
   118→
   119→    console.log('spriteMap results:', JSON.stringify(results, null, 2));
   120→
   121→    // stove
   122→    expect(results.stove.hasSpriteMap, 'stove should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);
   123→    expect(results.stove.idle,    'stove idle sprite').toBe('stove_off');
   124→    expect(results.stove.cooking, 'stove cooking sprite').toBe('stove_on');
   125→    expect(results.stove.done,    'stove done sprite').toBe('stove_on');
   126→
   127→    // tea_set
   128→    expect(results.tea_set.hasSpriteMap, 'tea_set should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);
   129→    expect(results.tea_set.idle,    'tea_set idle sprite').toBe('cup_empty');
   130→    expect(results.tea_set.brewing, 'tea_set brewing sprite').toBe('cup_full');
   131→    expect(results.tea_set.ready,   'tea_set ready sprite').toBe('cup_full');
   132→
   133→    // bookshelf
   134→    expect(results.bookshelf.hasSpriteMap, 'bookshelf should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);
   135→    expect(results.bookshelf.idle,    'bookshelf idle sprite').toBe('book_closed');
   136→    expect(results.bookshelf.reading, 'bookshelf reading sprite').toBe('book_open');
   137→
   138→    // easel
   139→    expect(results.easel.hasSpriteMap, 'easel should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);
   140→    expect(results.easel.idle,     'easel idle sprite').toBe('easel_blank');
   141→    expect(results.easel.painting, 'easel painting sprite').toBe('easel_painting');
   142→    expect(results.easel.done,     'easel done sprite').toBe('easel_finished');
   143→
   144→    // Objects without spriteMap should return null
   145→    expect(results.fridge.hasSpriteMap,  'fridge should NOT have a spriteMap').toBe(false);
   146→    expect(results.kotatsu.hasSpriteMap, 'kotatsu should NOT have a spriteMap').toBe(false);
   147→    expect(results.bonsai.hasSpriteMap,  'bonsai should NOT have a spriteMap').toBe(false);
   148→  });
   149→
   150→  // ── TEST 2: interact() returns spriteKey ─────────────────────────────────────
   151→
   152→  test('interact() returns spriteKey for mapped objects and null for unmapped objects', async ({ page }) => {
   153→    test.setTimeout(30_000);
   154→
   155→    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);
   156→    await waitForEngine(page);
   157→
   158→    const results = await page.evaluate(() => {
   159→      const engine = window._gameEngine;
   160→
   161→      // stove: idle → cooking (spriteKey: 'stove_on')
   162→      const stove = engine.objectEngine.getById('stove');
   163→      const stoveEv = stove.interact('use');
   164→
   165→      // tea_set: idle → brewing (spriteKey: 'cup_full')
   166→      const teaSet = engine.objectEngine.getById('tea_set');
   167→      const teaEv = teaSet.interact('use');
   168→
   169→      // bookshelf: idle → reading (spriteKey: 'book_open')
   170→      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');
   171→      const bookEv = bookshelf.interact('use');
   172→
   173→      // easel: idle → painting (spriteKey: 'easel_painting')
   174→      const easel = engine.objectEngine.getById('easel');
   175→      const easelEv = easel.interact('use');
   176→
   177→      // fridge: idle → open (no spriteMap → spriteKey null/undefined)
   178→      const fridge = engine.objectEngine.getById('fridge');
   179→      const fridgeEv = fridge.interact('use');
   180→
   181→      // bonsai: idle → tending (no spriteMap)
   182→      const bonsai = engine.objectEngine.getById('bonsai');
   183→      const bonsaiEv = bonsai.interact('use');
   184→
   185→      return {
   186→        stove:     { state: stoveEv?.state,     spriteKey: stoveEv?.spriteKey     },
   187→        teaSet:    { state: teaEv?.state,        spriteKey: teaEv?.spriteKey       },
   188→        bookshelf: { state: bookEv?.state,       spriteKey: bookEv?.spriteKey      },
   189→        easel:     { state: easelEv?.state,      spriteKey: easelEv?.spriteKey     },
   190→        fridge:    { state: fridgeEv?.state,     spriteKey: fridgeEv?.spriteKey    },
   191→        bonsai:    { state: bonsaiEv?.state,     spriteKey: bonsaiEv?.spriteKey    },
   192→      };
   193→    });
   194→
   195→    console.log('interact() spriteKey results:', JSON.stringify(results));
   196→
   197→    // Mapped objects: spriteKey should match the new state's sprite
   198→    expect(results.stove.state,         'stove state after interact').toBe('cooking');
   199→    expect(results.stove.spriteKey,     'stove spriteKey after interact').toBe('stove_on');
   200→
   201→    expect(results.teaSet.state,        'tea_set state after interact').toBe('brewing');
   202→    expect(results.teaSet.spriteKey,    'tea_set spriteKey after interact').toBe('cup_full');
   203→
   204→    expect(results.bookshelf.state,     'bookshelf state after interact').toBe('reading');
   205→    expect(results.bookshelf.spriteKey, 'bookshelf spriteKey after interact').toBe('book_open');
   206→
   207→    expect(results.easel.state,         'easel state after interact').toBe('painting');
   208→    expect(results.easel.spriteKey,     'easel spriteKey after interact').toBe('easel_painting');
   209→
   210→    // Unmapped objects: spriteKey should be null or undefined (falsy)
   211→    expect(results.fridge.state,        'fridge state after interact').toBe('open');
   212→    expect(results.fridge.spriteKey ?? null, 'fridge spriteKey should be null (no spriteMap)').toBeNull();
   213→
   214→    expect(results.bonsai.state,        'bonsai state after interact').toBe('tending');
   215→    expect(results.bonsai.spriteKey ?? null, 'bonsai spriteKey should be null (no spriteMap)').toBeNull();
   216→  });
   217→
   218→  // ── TEST 3: tick() auto-transition returns spriteKey ─────────────────────────
   219→
   220→  test('tick() returns spriteKey on auto-transition for mapped objects', async ({ page }) => {
   221→    test.setTimeout(30_000);
   222→
   223→    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);
   224→    await waitForEngine(page);
   225→
   226→    const results = await page.evaluate(() => {
   227→      const engine = window._gameEngine;
   228→
   229→      // ── bookshelf: idle → reading (via interact), then reading → idle (via tick) ──
   230→      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');
   231→      // Put bookshelf into 'reading' state (auto_next: idle after 40s)
   232→      bookshelf.interact('use'); // idle → reading
   233→      // Fast-forward the auto timer to trigger the reading → idle transition
   234→      bookshelf.autoTimer = 1; // 1ms remaining
   235→      const bookTickEv = bookshelf.tick(100); // 100ms delta → timer expires
   236→
   237→      // ── stove: cooking → done (via tick, auto_next: done after 30s) ──
   238→      const stove = engine.objectEngine.getById('stove');
   239→      stove.interact('use'); // idle → cooking (sets autoTimer = 30 * 1000)
   240→      stove.autoTimer = 1;   // fast-forward
   241→      const stoveCookingToDoneEv = stove.tick(100); // cooking → done
   242→
   243→      // ── stove: done → idle (via tick, auto_next: idle after 60s) ──
   244→      stove.autoTimer = 1;
   245→      const stoneDoneToIdleEv = stove.tick(100); // done → idle
   246→
   247→      // ── easel: painting → done (via tick, auto_next: done after 45s) ──
   248→      const easel = engine.objectEngine.getById('easel');
   249→      easel.interact('use'); // idle → painting
   250→      easel.autoTimer = 1;
   251→      const easelPaintingToDoneEv = easel.tick(100); // painting → done
   252→
   253→      // ── fridge (no spriteMap): open → idle (via tick) ──
   254→      const fridge = engine.objectEngine.getById('fridge');
   255→      fridge.interact('use'); // idle → open (auto_next: idle after 10s)
   256→      fridge.autoTimer = 1;
   257→      const fridgeTickEv = fridge.tick(100); // open → idle
   258→
   259→      return {
   260→        book_readingToIdle: {
   261→          state:     bookTickEv?.state,
   262→          auto:      bookTickEv?.auto,
   263→          spriteKey: bookTickEv?.spriteKey,
   264→        },
   265→        stove_cookingToDone: {
   266→          state:     stoveCookingToDoneEv?.state,
   267→          auto:      stoveCookingToDoneEv?.auto,
   268→          spriteKey: stoveCookingToDoneEv?.spriteKey,
   269→        },
   270→        stove_doneToIdle: {
   271→          state:     stoneDoneToIdleEv?.state,
   272→          auto:      stoneDoneToIdleEv?.auto,
   273→          spriteKey: stoneDoneToIdleEv?.spriteKey,
   274→        },
   275→        easel_paintingToDone: {
   276→          state:     easelPaintingToDoneEv?.state,
   277→          auto:      easelPaintingToDoneEv?.auto,
   278→          spriteKey: easelPaintingToDoneEv?.spriteKey,
   279→        },
   280→        fridge_openToIdle: {
   281→          state:     fridgeTickEv?.state,
   282→          auto:      fridgeTickEv?.auto,
   283→          spriteKey: fridgeTickEv?.spriteKey,
   284→        },
   285→      };
   286→    });
   287→
   288→    console.log('tick() spriteKey results:', JSON.stringify(results, null, 2));
   289→
   290→    // bookshelf: reading → idle auto-transition
   291→    expect(results.book_readingToIdle.state,     'bookshelf auto → idle state').toBe('idle');
   292→    expect(results.book_readingToIdle.auto,       'bookshelf tick event should be auto').toBe(true);
   293→    expect(results.book_readingToIdle.spriteKey,  'bookshelf idle sprite via tick').toBe('book_closed');
   294→
   295→    // stove: cooking → done auto-transition (both map to stove_on)
   296→    expect(results.stove_cookingToDone.state,     'stove auto → done state').toBe('done');
   297→    expect(results.stove_cookingToDone.auto,       'stove cooking→done tick event should be auto').toBe(true);
   298→    expect(results.stove_cookingToDone.spriteKey,  'stove done sprite via tick').toBe('stove_on');
   299→
   300→    // stove: done → idle auto-transition (returns to stove_off)
   301→    expect(results.stove_doneToIdle.state,         'stove auto → idle state').toBe('idle');
   302→    expect(results.stove_doneToIdle.auto,           'stove done→idle tick event should be auto').toBe(true);
   303→    expect(results.stove_doneToIdle.spriteKey,      'stove idle sprite via tick').toBe('stove_off');
   304→
   305→    // easel: painting → done auto-transition
   306→    expect(results.easel_paintingToDone.state,     'easel auto → done state').toBe('done');
   307→    expect(results.easel_paintingToDone.auto,       'easel painting→done tick event should be auto').toBe(true);
   308→    expect(results.easel_paintingToDone.spriteKey,  'easel done sprite via tick').toBe('easel_finished');
   309→
   310→    // fridge (no spriteMap): tick event should have null/undefined spriteKey
   311→    expect(results.fridge_openToIdle.state,        'fridge auto → idle state').toBe('idle');
   312→    expect(results.fridge_openToIdle.auto,          'fridge tick event should be auto').toBe(true);
   313→    expect(results.fridge_openToIdle.spriteKey ?? null, 'fridge tick spriteKey should be null').toBeNull();
   314→  });
   315→
   316→  // ── TEST 4: Scene renders object sprite overlays ──────────────────────────────
   317→
   318→  test('scene creates _objectSprites for mapped objects at depth=1 with origin(0,0) and idle texture', async ({ page }) => {
   319→    test.setTimeout(30_000);
   320→
   321→    await injectSceneExposure(page);
   322→    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);
   323→    await waitForEngine(page);
   324→
   325→    // Give Phaser one extra RAF cycle to finish create()
   326→    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
   327→
   328→    const result = await page.evaluate(() => {
   329→      const scene = window._gameScene;
   330→      if (!scene || !scene._objectSprites) {
   331→        return { error: '_objectSprites not found on scene' };
   332→      }
   333→
   334→      const TILE_SIZE = 48;
   335→      const spriteIds = Object.keys(scene._objectSprites);
   336→
   337→      const details = {};
   338→      for (const id of spriteIds) {
   339→        const img = scene._objectSprites[id];
   340→        const engine = window._gameEngine;
   341→        const obj = engine.objectEngine.getById(id);
   342→        const expectedX = obj?.tx != null ? obj.tx * TILE_SIZE : null;
   343→        const expectedY = obj?.ty != null ? obj.ty * TILE_SIZE : null;
   344→        details[id] = {
   345→          textureKey: img.texture?.key,
   346→          depth:      img.depth,
   347→          originX:    img.originX,
   348→          originY:    img.originY,
   349→          x:          img.x,
   350→          y:          img.y,
   351→          expectedX,
   352→          expectedY,
   353→        };
   354→      }
   355→
   356→      return { spriteIds, details };
   357→    });
   358→
   359→    console.log('_objectSprites result:', JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));
   360→
   361→    // Should not have an error
   362→    expect(result.error, result.error).toBeUndefined();
   363→
   364→    // All 4 mapped objects must have sprite entries
   365→    const MAPPED_IDS = ['stove', 'tea_set', 'bookshelf', 'easel'];
   366→    for (const id of MAPPED_IDS) {
   367→      expect(result.spriteIds, `_objectSprites should contain '${id}'`).toContain(id);
   368→    }
   369→
   370→    // No entries for unmapped objects
   371→    const UNMAPPED_IDS = ['fridge', 'kotatsu', 'bonsai', 'desk', 'bed', 'tv'];
   372→    for (const id of UNMAPPED_IDS) {
   373→      expect(result.spriteIds, `_objectSprites should NOT contain '${id}'`).not.toContain(id);
   374→    }
   375→
   376→    // Verify depth, origin, position, and initial texture for each mapped object
   377→    const EXPECTED_IDLE_SPRITES = {
   378→      stove:     'stove_off',
   379→      tea_set:   'cup_empty',
   380→      bookshelf: 'book_closed',
   381→      easel:     'easel_blank',
   382→    };
   383→
   384→    for (const id of MAPPED_IDS) {
   385→      const d = result.details[id];
   386→      expect(d.depth,   `${id} sprite depth should be 1`).toBe(1);
   387→      expect(d.originX, `${id} sprite originX should be 0`).toBe(0);
   388→      expect(d.originY, `${id} sprite originY should be 0`).toBe(0);
   389→      expect(d.textureKey,
   390→        `${id} initial texture should be the idle sprite '${EXPECTED_IDLE_SPRITES[id]}'`
   391→      ).toBe(EXPECTED_IDLE_SPRITES[id]);
   392→      // Position should match object tile * TILE_SIZE
   393→      expect(d.x, `${id} sprite x should be tx*48`).toBe(d.expectedX);
   394→      expect(d.y, `${id} sprite y should be ty*48`).toBe(d.expectedY);
   395→    }
   396→  });
   397→
   398→  // ── TEST 5: Sprite texture swaps on state transition (live sim) ───────────────
   399→
   400→  test('_objectSprites texture swaps on state transition and reverts to idle on return', async ({ page }) => {
   401→    test.setTimeout(30_000);
   402→
   403→    await injectSceneExposure(page);
   404→    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);
   405→    await waitForEngine(page);
   406→    await page.waitForTimeout(500); // let Phaser create() complete
   407→
   408→    // ── 5a: Check initial textures ────────────────────────────────────────────
   409→    const initialTextures = await page.evaluate(() => {
   410→      const scene = window._gameScene;
   411→      return {
   412→        stove:     scene._objectSprites?.stove?.texture?.key,
   413→        tea_set:   scene._objectSprites?.tea_set?.texture?.key,
   414→        bookshelf: scene._objectSprites?.bookshelf?.texture?.key,
   415→        easel:     scene._objectSprites?.easel?.texture?.key,
   416→      };
   417→    });
   418→
   419→    console.log('Initial textures:', JSON.stringify(initialTextures));
   420→    expect(initialTextures.stove,     'stove initial texture').toBe('stove_off');
   421→    expect(initialTextures.tea_set,   'tea_set initial texture').toBe('cup_empty');
   422→    expect(initialTextures.bookshelf, 'bookshelf initial texture').toBe('book_closed');
   423→    expect(initialTextures.easel,     'easel initial texture').toBe('easel_blank');
   424→
   425→    // ── 5b: Trigger interact → cooking, push spriteKey event to pendingEvents ──
   426→    await page.evaluate(() => {
   427→      const engine = window._gameEngine;
   428→      // Interact with stove: idle → cooking
   429→      const ev = engine.objectEngine.interact('stove', 'use');
   430→      // Push the event so scene.update() picks it up on the next RAF
   431→      if (ev) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev);
   432→    });
   433→
   434→    // Wait for Phaser's RAF loop to call scene.update() and process pendingEvents
   435→    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
   436→
   437→    const afterCookingTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {
   438→      const scene = window._gameScene;
   439→      return scene._objectSprites?.stove?.texture?.key;
   440→    });
   441→
   442→    console.log('Stove texture after idle→cooking interact:', afterCookingTexture);
   443→    expect(afterCookingTexture,
   444→      'stove texture should be stove_on after transitioning to cooking'
   445→    ).toBe('stove_on');
   446→
   447→    // ── 5c: Auto-tick stove through done → idle, verify texture reverts ────────
   448→    await page.evaluate(() => {
   449→      const engine = window._gameEngine;
   450→      const stove = engine.objectEngine.getById('stove');
   451→
   452→      // Fast-forward: cooking → done via auto timer
   453→      stove.autoTimer = 1;
   454→      const ev1 = stove.tick(100); // cooking → done (spriteKey: 'stove_on', same visual)
   455→      if (ev1?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev1);
   456→
   457→      // Fast-forward: done → idle via auto timer
   458→      stove.autoTimer = 1;
   459→      const ev2 = stove.tick(100); // done → idle (spriteKey: 'stove_off')
   460→      if (ev2?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev2);
   461→    });
   462→
   463→    // Wait for RAF to process both events
   464→    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
   465→
   466→    const afterIdleTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {
   467→      const scene = window._gameScene;
   468→      return scene._objectSprites?.stove?.texture?.key;
   469→    });
   470→
   471→    console.log('Stove texture after returning to idle:', afterIdleTexture);
   472→    expect(afterIdleTexture,
   473→      'stove texture should revert to stove_off after returning to idle'
   474→    ).toBe('stove_off');
   475→
   476→    // ── 5d: Verify bookshelf swap (idle→reading→idle) ──────────────────────────
   477→    await page.evaluate(() => {
   478→      const engine = window._gameEngine;
   479→      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');
   480→
   481→      // idle → reading
   482→      const ev1 = bookshelf.interact('use');
   483→      if (ev1?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev1);
   484→    });
   485→
   486→    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
   487→
   488→    const bookshelfReadingTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {
   489→      const scene = window._gameScene;
   490→      return scene._objectSprites?.bookshelf?.texture?.key;
   491→    });
   492→
   493→    console.log('Bookshelf texture after idle→reading:', bookshelfReadingTexture);
   494→    expect(bookshelfReadingTexture,
   495→      'bookshelf texture should be book_open after transitioning to reading'
   496→    ).toBe('book_open');
   497→
   498→    await page.evaluate(() => {
   499→      const engine = window._gameEngine;
   500→      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');
   501→
   502→      // reading → idle via auto timer
   503→      bookshelf.autoTimer = 1;
   504→      const ev2 = bookshelf.tick(100);
   505→      if (ev2?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev2);
   506→    });
   507→
   508→    await page.waitForTimeout(500);
   509→
   510→    const bookshelfIdleTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {
   511→      const scene = window._gameScene;
   512→      return scene._objectSprites?.bookshelf?.texture?.key;
   513→    });
   514→
   515→    console.log('Bookshelf texture after reading→idle:', bookshelfIdleTexture);
   516→    expect(bookshelfIdleTexture,
   517→      'bookshelf texture should revert to book_closed after returning to idle'
   518→    ).toBe('book_closed');
   519→  });
   520→});
   521→

  "content": {
    "tool_use_id": "toolu_015GTkEeAEDmUFGiEbwAjvFz",
    "type": "tool_result",
    "content": "     1\u2192'use strict';\n     2\u2192/**\n     3\u2192 * REGRESSION \u2014 FRG-246\n     4\u2192 * Objects change sprite when state transitions.\n     5\u2192 *\n     6\u2192 * Tests run against the local dev server (http://localhost:5176) which serves\n     7\u2192 * the master branch of the source repository.\n     8\u2192 *\n     9\u2192 * window._gameEngine is set unconditionally in scene.js create() \u2014 no route\n    10\u2192 * injection needed.\n    11\u2192 *\n    12\u2192 * Key implementation under test:\n    13\u2192 *   - OBJECT_DEFS in src/objects.js: stove, tea_set, bookshelf, easel have spriteMap\n    14\u2192 *   - ObjectInstance.interact() returns { spriteKey } matching the new state's entry\n    15\u2192 *   - ObjectInstance.tick()     returns { spriteKey } on auto-transition\n    16\u2192 *   - scene.js creates this._objectSprites[id] images (depth=1, origin(0,0))\n    17\u2192 *   - scene.update() swaps texture via setTexture(ev.spriteKey) from pendingEvents\n    18\u2192 *\n    19\u2192 * spriteMap definitions:\n    20\u2192 *   stove:     { idle: 'stove_off',    cooking: 'stove_on',        done: 'stove_on'        }\n    21\u2192 *   tea_set:   { idle: 'cup_empty',    brewing: 'cup_full',        ready: 'cup_full'       }\n    22\u2192 *   bookshelf: { idle: 'book_closed',  reading: 'book_open'                                }\n    23\u2192 *   easel:     { idle: 'easel_blank',  painting: 'easel_painting', done: 'easel_finished'  }\n    24\u2192 *\n    25\u2192 * Test layout:\n    26\u2192 *   1. spriteMap defined on stove, tea_set, bookshelf, easel \u2014 correct keys and idle sprites\n    27\u2192 *   2. interact() returns spriteKey matching new state; null for objects without spriteMap\n    28\u2192 *   3. tick() auto-transition returns correct spriteKey\n    29\u2192 *   4. Scene creates _objectSprites with depth=1 and origin(0,0), initial texture = idle sprite\n    30\u2192 *   5. Sprite texture swaps on interact event; swaps back to idle on return transition\n    31\u2192 */\n    32\u2192const { test, expect } = require('@playwright/test');\n    33\u2192\n    34\u2192const LOCAL_URL = 'http://localhost:5176';\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192// \u2500\u2500 helpers \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192/**\n    39\u2192 * Wait for the SimulationEngine to be fully initialised with 3 characters.\n    40\u2192 */\n    41\u2192async function waitForEngine(page) {\n    42\u2192  await page.waitForFunction(\n    43\u2192    () => window._gameEngine?.characters?.length === 3,\n    44\u2192    { timeout: 15_000 }\n    45\u2192  );\n    46\u2192}\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192/**\n    49\u2192 * Intercept scene.js to inject window._gameScene = this inside create().\n    50\u2192 * This lets tests access _objectSprites from the CafeScene instance.\n    51\u2192 */\n    52\u2192async function injectSceneExposure(page) {\n    53\u2192  await page.route('**/scene.js*', async (route) => {\n    54\u2192    const response = await route.fetch();\n    55\u2192    let body = await response.text();\n    56\u2192    body = body.replace(\n    57\u2192      'window._gameEngine = this.engine;',\n    58\u2192      'window._gameEngine = this.engine;\\n    window._gameScene = this;'\n    59\u2192    );\n    60\u2192    await route.fulfill({ response, body });\n    61\u2192  });\n    62\u2192}\n    63\u2192\n    64\u2192// \u2500\u2500 Tests \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    65\u2192\n    66\u2192test.describe('FRG-246: Object Sprite Swap on State Transition', () => {\n    67\u2192\n    68\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 TEST 1: spriteMap defined on all 4 mapped objects \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192  test('spriteMap is defined on stove, tea_set, bookshelf, and easel with correct entries', async ({ page }) => {\n    71\u2192    test.setTimeout(30_000);\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);\n    74\u2192    await waitForEngine(page);\n    75\u2192\n    76\u2192    const results = await page.evaluate(() => {\n    77\u2192      const engine = window._gameEngine;\n    78\u2192      const objects = engine.objectEngine.getAll();\n    79\u2192      const byId = {};\n    80\u2192      for (const o of objects) byId[o.id] = o;\n    81\u2192\n    82\u2192      return {\n    83\u2192        stove: {\n    84\u2192          hasSpriteMap:  byId.stove?.spriteMap != null,\n    85\u2192          idle:          byId.stove?.spriteMap?.idle,\n    86\u2192          cooking:       byId.stove?.spriteMap?.cooking,\n    87\u2192          done:          byId.stove?.spriteMap?.done,\n    88\u2192        },\n    89\u2192        tea_set: {\n    90\u2192          hasSpriteMap:  byId.tea_set?.spriteMap != null,\n    91\u2192          idle:          byId.tea_set?.spriteMap?.idle,\n    92\u2192          brewing:       byId.tea_set?.spriteMap?.brewing,\n    93\u2192          ready:         byId.tea_set?.spriteMap?.ready,\n    94\u2192        },\n    95\u2192        bookshelf: {\n    96\u2192          hasSpriteMap:  byId.bookshelf?.spriteMap != null,\n    97\u2192          idle:          byId.bookshelf?.spriteMap?.idle,\n    98\u2192          reading:       byId.bookshelf?.spriteMap?.reading,\n    99\u2192        },\n   100\u2192        easel: {\n   101\u2192          hasSpriteMap:  byId.easel?.spriteMap != null,\n   102\u2192          idle:          byId.easel?.spriteMap?.idle,\n   103\u2192          painting:      byId.easel?.spriteMap?.painting,\n   104\u2192          done:          byId.easel?.spriteMap?.done,\n   105\u2192        },\n   106\u2192        // Objects without a spriteMap\n   107\u2192        fridge: {\n   108\u2192          hasSpriteMap:  byId.fridge?.spriteMap != null,\n   109\u2192        },\n   110\u2192        kotatsu: {\n   111\u2192          hasSpriteMap:  byId.kotatsu?.spriteMap != null,\n   112\u2192        },\n   113\u2192        bonsai: {\n   114\u2192          hasSpriteMap:  byId.bonsai?.spriteMap != null,\n   115\u2192        },\n   116\u2192      };\n   117\u2192    });\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192    console.log('spriteMap results:', JSON.stringify(results, null, 2));\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192    // stove\n   122\u2192    expect(results.stove.hasSpriteMap, 'stove should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);\n   123\u2192    expect(results.stove.idle,    'stove idle sprite').toBe('stove_off');\n   124\u2192    expect(results.stove.cooking, 'stove cooking sprite').toBe('stove_on');\n   125\u2192    expect(results.stove.done,    'stove done sprite').toBe('stove_on');\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192    // tea_set\n   128\u2192    expect(results.tea_set.hasSpriteMap, 'tea_set should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);\n   129\u2192    expect(results.tea_set.idle,    'tea_set idle sprite').toBe('cup_empty');\n   130\u2192    expect(results.tea_set.brewing, 'tea_set brewing sprite').toBe('cup_full');\n   131\u2192    expect(results.tea_set.ready,   'tea_set ready sprite').toBe('cup_full');\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192    // bookshelf\n   134\u2192    expect(results.bookshelf.hasSpriteMap, 'bookshelf should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);\n   135\u2192    expect(results.bookshelf.idle,    'bookshelf idle sprite').toBe('book_closed');\n   136\u2192    expect(results.bookshelf.reading, 'bookshelf reading sprite').toBe('book_open');\n   137\u2192\n   138\u2192    // easel\n   139\u2192    expect(results.easel.hasSpriteMap, 'easel should have a spriteMap').toBe(true);\n   140\u2192    expect(results.easel.idle,     'easel idle sprite').toBe('easel_blank');\n   141\u2192    expect(results.easel.painting, 'easel painting sprite').toBe('easel_painting');\n   142\u2192    expect(results.easel.done,     'easel done sprite').toBe('easel_finished');\n   143\u2192\n   144\u2192    // Objects without spriteMap should return null\n   145\u2192    expect(results.fridge.hasSpriteMap,  'fridge should NOT have a spriteMap').toBe(false);\n   146\u2192    expect(results.kotatsu.hasSpriteMap, 'kotatsu should NOT have a spriteMap').toBe(false);\n   147\u2192    expect(results.bonsai.hasSpriteMap,  'bonsai should NOT have a spriteMap').toBe(false);\n   148\u2192  });\n   149\u2192\n   150\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 TEST 2: interact() returns spriteKey \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192  test('interact() returns spriteKey for mapped objects and null for unmapped objects', async ({ page }) => {\n   153\u2192    test.setTimeout(30_000);\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);\n   156\u2192    await waitForEngine(page);\n   157\u2192\n   158\u2192    const results = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   159\u2192      const engine = window._gameEngine;\n   160\u2192\n   161\u2192      // stove: idle \u2192 cooking (spriteKey: 'stove_on')\n   162\u2192      const stove = engine.objectEngine.getById('stove');\n   163\u2192      const stoveEv = stove.interact('use');\n   164\u2192\n   165\u2192      // tea_set: idle \u2192 brewing (spriteKey: 'cup_full')\n   166\u2192      const teaSet = engine.objectEngine.getById('tea_set');\n   167\u2192      const teaEv = teaSet.interact('use');\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192      // bookshelf: idle \u2192 reading (spriteKey: 'book_open')\n   170\u2192      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');\n   171\u2192      const bookEv = bookshelf.interact('use');\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192      // easel: idle \u2192 painting (spriteKey: 'easel_painting')\n   174\u2192      const easel = engine.objectEngine.getById('easel');\n   175\u2192      const easelEv = easel.interact('use');\n   176\u2192\n   177\u2192      // fridge: idle \u2192 open (no spriteMap \u2192 spriteKey null/undefined)\n   178\u2192      const fridge = engine.objectEngine.getById('fridge');\n   179\u2192      const fridgeEv = fridge.interact('use');\n   180\u2192\n   181\u2192      // bonsai: idle \u2192 tending (no spriteMap)\n   182\u2192      const bonsai = engine.objectEngine.getById('bonsai');\n   183\u2192      const bonsaiEv = bonsai.interact('use');\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192      return {\n   186\u2192        stove:     { state: stoveEv?.state,     spriteKey: stoveEv?.spriteKey     },\n   187\u2192        teaSet:    { state: teaEv?.state,        spriteKey: teaEv?.spriteKey       },\n   188\u2192        bookshelf: { state: bookEv?.state,       spriteKey: bookEv?.spriteKey      },\n   189\u2192        easel:     { state: easelEv?.state,      spriteKey: easelEv?.spriteKey     },\n   190\u2192        fridge:    { state: fridgeEv?.state,     spriteKey: fridgeEv?.spriteKey    },\n   191\u2192        bonsai:    { state: bonsaiEv?.state,     spriteKey: bonsaiEv?.spriteKey    },\n   192\u2192      };\n   193\u2192    });\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192    console.log('interact() spriteKey results:', JSON.stringify(results));\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192    // Mapped objects: spriteKey should match the new state's sprite\n   198\u2192    expect(results.stove.state,         'stove state after interact').toBe('cooking');\n   199\u2192    expect(results.stove.spriteKey,     'stove spriteKey after interact').toBe('stove_on');\n   200\u2192\n   201\u2192    expect(results.teaSet.state,        'tea_set state after interact').toBe('brewing');\n   202\u2192    expect(results.teaSet.spriteKey,    'tea_set spriteKey after interact').toBe('cup_full');\n   203\u2192\n   204\u2192    expect(results.bookshelf.state,     'bookshelf state after interact').toBe('reading');\n   205\u2192    expect(results.bookshelf.spriteKey, 'bookshelf spriteKey after interact').toBe('book_open');\n   206\u2192\n   207\u2192    expect(results.easel.state,         'easel state after interact').toBe('painting');\n   208\u2192    expect(results.easel.spriteKey,     'easel spriteKey after interact').toBe('easel_painting');\n   209\u2192\n   210\u2192    // Unmapped objects: spriteKey should be null or undefined (falsy)\n   211\u2192    expect(results.fridge.state,        'fridge state after interact').toBe('open');\n   212\u2192    expect(results.fridge.spriteKey ?? null, 'fridge spriteKey should be null (no spriteMap)').toBeNull();\n   213\u2192\n   214\u2192    expect(results.bonsai.state,        'bonsai state after interact').toBe('tending');\n   215\u2192    expect(results.bonsai.spriteKey ?? null, 'bonsai spriteKey should be null (no spriteMap)').toBeNull();\n   216\u2192  });\n   217\u2192\n   218\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 TEST 3: tick() auto-transition returns spriteKey \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192  test('tick() returns spriteKey on auto-transition for mapped objects', async ({ page }) => {\n   221\u2192    test.setTimeout(30_000);\n   222\u2192\n   223\u2192    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);\n   224\u2192    await waitForEngine(page);\n   225\u2192\n   226\u2192    const results = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   227\u2192      const engine = window._gameEngine;\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192      // \u2500\u2500 bookshelf: idle \u2192 reading (via interact), then reading \u2192 idle (via tick) \u2500\u2500\n   230\u2192      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');\n   231\u2192      // Put bookshelf into 'reading' state (auto_next: idle after 40s)\n   232\u2192      bookshelf.interact('use'); // idle \u2192 reading\n   233\u2192      // Fast-forward the auto timer to trigger the reading \u2192 idle transition\n   234\u2192      bookshelf.autoTimer = 1; // 1ms remaining\n   235\u2192      const bookTickEv = bookshelf.tick(100); // 100ms delta \u2192 timer expires\n   236\u2192\n   237\u2192      // \u2500\u2500 stove: cooking \u2192 done (via tick, auto_next: done after 30s) \u2500\u2500\n   238\u2192      const stove = engine.objectEngine.getById('stove');\n   239\u2192      stove.interact('use'); // idle \u2192 cooking (sets autoTimer = 30 * 1000)\n   240\u2192      stove.autoTimer = 1;   // fast-forward\n   241\u2192      const stoveCookingToDoneEv = stove.tick(100); // cooking \u2192 done\n   242\u2192\n   243\u2192      // \u2500\u2500 stove: done \u2192 idle (via tick, auto_next: idle after 60s) \u2500\u2500\n   244\u2192      stove.autoTimer = 1;\n   245\u2192      const stoneDoneToIdleEv = stove.tick(100); // done \u2192 idle\n   246\u2192\n   247\u2192      // \u2500\u2500 easel: painting \u2192 done (via tick, auto_next: done after 45s) \u2500\u2500\n   248\u2192      const easel = engine.objectEngine.getById('easel');\n   249\u2192      easel.interact('use'); // idle \u2192 painting\n   250\u2192      easel.autoTimer = 1;\n   251\u2192      const easelPaintingToDoneEv = easel.tick(100); // painting \u2192 done\n   252\u2192\n   253\u2192      // \u2500\u2500 fridge (no spriteMap): open \u2192 idle (via tick) \u2500\u2500\n   254\u2192      const fridge = engine.objectEngine.getById('fridge');\n   255\u2192      fridge.interact('use'); // idle \u2192 open (auto_next: idle after 10s)\n   256\u2192      fridge.autoTimer = 1;\n   257\u2192      const fridgeTickEv = fridge.tick(100); // open \u2192 idle\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192      return {\n   260\u2192        book_readingToIdle: {\n   261\u2192          state:     bookTickEv?.state,\n   262\u2192          auto:      bookTickEv?.auto,\n   263\u2192          spriteKey: bookTickEv?.spriteKey,\n   264\u2192        },\n   265\u2192        stove_cookingToDone: {\n   266\u2192          state:     stoveCookingToDoneEv?.state,\n   267\u2192          auto:      stoveCookingToDoneEv?.auto,\n   268\u2192          spriteKey: stoveCookingToDoneEv?.spriteKey,\n   269\u2192        },\n   270\u2192        stove_doneToIdle: {\n   271\u2192          state:     stoneDoneToIdleEv?.state,\n   272\u2192          auto:      stoneDoneToIdleEv?.auto,\n   273\u2192          spriteKey: stoneDoneToIdleEv?.spriteKey,\n   274\u2192        },\n   275\u2192        easel_paintingToDone: {\n   276\u2192          state:     easelPaintingToDoneEv?.state,\n   277\u2192          auto:      easelPaintingToDoneEv?.auto,\n   278\u2192          spriteKey: easelPaintingToDoneEv?.spriteKey,\n   279\u2192        },\n   280\u2192        fridge_openToIdle: {\n   281\u2192          state:     fridgeTickEv?.state,\n   282\u2192          auto:      fridgeTickEv?.auto,\n   283\u2192          spriteKey: fridgeTickEv?.spriteKey,\n   284\u2192        },\n   285\u2192      };\n   286\u2192    });\n   287\u2192\n   288\u2192    console.log('tick() spriteKey results:', JSON.stringify(results, null, 2));\n   289\u2192\n   290\u2192    // bookshelf: reading \u2192 idle auto-transition\n   291\u2192    expect(results.book_readingToIdle.state,     'bookshelf auto \u2192 idle state').toBe('idle');\n   292\u2192    expect(results.book_readingToIdle.auto,       'bookshelf tick event should be auto').toBe(true);\n   293\u2192    expect(results.book_readingToIdle.spriteKey,  'bookshelf idle sprite via tick').toBe('book_closed');\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192    // stove: cooking \u2192 done auto-transition (both map to stove_on)\n   296\u2192    expect(results.stove_cookingToDone.state,     'stove auto \u2192 done state').toBe('done');\n   297\u2192    expect(results.stove_cookingToDone.auto,       'stove cooking\u2192done tick event should be auto').toBe(true);\n   298\u2192    expect(results.stove_cookingToDone.spriteKey,  'stove done sprite via tick').toBe('stove_on');\n   299\u2192\n   300\u2192    // stove: done \u2192 idle auto-transition (returns to stove_off)\n   301\u2192    expect(results.stove_doneToIdle.state,         'stove auto \u2192 idle state').toBe('idle');\n   302\u2192    expect(results.stove_doneToIdle.auto,           'stove done\u2192idle tick event should be auto').toBe(true);\n   303\u2192    expect(results.stove_doneToIdle.spriteKey,      'stove idle sprite via tick').toBe('stove_off');\n   304\u2192\n   305\u2192    // easel: painting \u2192 done auto-transition\n   306\u2192    expect(results.easel_paintingToDone.state,     'easel auto \u2192 done state').toBe('done');\n   307\u2192    expect(results.easel_paintingToDone.auto,       'easel painting\u2192done tick event should be auto').toBe(true);\n   308\u2192    expect(results.easel_paintingToDone.spriteKey,  'easel done sprite via tick').toBe('easel_finished');\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192    // fridge (no spriteMap): tick event should have null/undefined spriteKey\n   311\u2192    expect(results.fridge_openToIdle.state,        'fridge auto \u2192 idle state').toBe('idle');\n   312\u2192    expect(results.fridge_openToIdle.auto,          'fridge tick event should be auto').toBe(true);\n   313\u2192    expect(results.fridge_openToIdle.spriteKey ?? null, 'fridge tick spriteKey should be null').toBeNull();\n   314\u2192  });\n   315\u2192\n   316\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 TEST 4: Scene renders object sprite overlays \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   317\u2192\n   318\u2192  test('scene creates _objectSprites for mapped objects at depth=1 with origin(0,0) and idle texture', async ({ page }) => {\n   319\u2192    test.setTimeout(30_000);\n   320\u2192\n   321\u2192    await injectSceneExposure(page);\n   322\u2192    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);\n   323\u2192    await waitForEngine(page);\n   324\u2192\n   325\u2192    // Give Phaser one extra RAF cycle to finish create()\n   326\u2192    await page.waitForTimeout(500);\n   327\u2192\n   328\u2192    const result = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   329\u2192      const scene = window._gameScene;\n   330\u2192      if (!scene || !scene._objectSprites) {\n   331\u2192        return { error: '_objectSprites not found on scene' };\n   332\u2192      }\n   333\u2192\n   334\u2192      const TILE_SIZE = 48;\n   335\u2192      const spriteIds = Object.keys(scene._objectSprites);\n   336\u2192\n   337\u2192      const details = {};\n   338\u2192      for (const id of spriteIds) {\n   339\u2192        const img = scene._objectSprites[id];\n   340\u2192        const engine = window._gameEngine;\n   341\u2192        const obj = engine.objectEngine.getById(id);\n   342\u2192        const expectedX = obj?.tx != null ? obj.tx * TILE_SIZE : null;\n   343\u2192        const expectedY = obj?.ty != null ? obj.ty * TILE_SIZE : null;\n   344\u2192        details[id] = {\n   345\u2192          textureKey: img.texture?.key,\n   346\u2192          depth:      img.depth,\n   347\u2192          originX:    img.originX,\n   348\u2192          originY:    img.originY,\n   349\u2192          x:          img.x,\n   350\u2192          y:          img.y,\n   351\u2192          expectedX,\n   352\u2192          expectedY,\n   353\u2192        };\n   354\u2192      }\n   355\u2192\n   356\u2192      return { spriteIds, details };\n   357\u2192    });\n   358\u2192\n   359\u2192    console.log('_objectSprites result:', JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));\n   360\u2192\n   361\u2192    // Should not have an error\n   362\u2192    expect(result.error, result.error).toBeUndefined();\n   363\u2192\n   364\u2192    // All 4 mapped objects must have sprite entries\n   365\u2192    const MAPPED_IDS = ['stove', 'tea_set', 'bookshelf', 'easel'];\n   366\u2192    for (const id of MAPPED_IDS) {\n   367\u2192      expect(result.spriteIds, `_objectSprites should contain '${id}'`).toContain(id);\n   368\u2192    }\n   369\u2192\n   370\u2192    // No entries for unmapped objects\n   371\u2192    const UNMAPPED_IDS = ['fridge', 'kotatsu', 'bonsai', 'desk', 'bed', 'tv'];\n   372\u2192    for (const id of UNMAPPED_IDS) {\n   373\u2192      expect(result.spriteIds, `_objectSprites should NOT contain '${id}'`).not.toContain(id);\n   374\u2192    }\n   375\u2192\n   376\u2192    // Verify depth, origin, position, and initial texture for each mapped object\n   377\u2192    const EXPECTED_IDLE_SPRITES = {\n   378\u2192      stove:     'stove_off',\n   379\u2192      tea_set:   'cup_empty',\n   380\u2192      bookshelf: 'book_closed',\n   381\u2192      easel:     'easel_blank',\n   382\u2192    };\n   383\u2192\n   384\u2192    for (const id of MAPPED_IDS) {\n   385\u2192      const d = result.details[id];\n   386\u2192      expect(d.depth,   `${id} sprite depth should be 1`).toBe(1);\n   387\u2192      expect(d.originX, `${id} sprite originX should be 0`).toBe(0);\n   388\u2192      expect(d.originY, `${id} sprite originY should be 0`).toBe(0);\n   389\u2192      expect(d.textureKey,\n   390\u2192        `${id} initial texture should be the idle sprite '${EXPECTED_IDLE_SPRITES[id]}'`\n   391\u2192      ).toBe(EXPECTED_IDLE_SPRITES[id]);\n   392\u2192      // Position should match object tile * TILE_SIZE\n   393\u2192      expect(d.x, `${id} sprite x should be tx*48`).toBe(d.expectedX);\n   394\u2192      expect(d.y, `${id} sprite y should be ty*48`).toBe(d.expectedY);\n   395\u2192    }\n   396\u2192  });\n   397\u2192\n   398\u2192  // \u2500\u2500 TEST 5: Sprite texture swaps on state transition (live sim) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   399\u2192\n   400\u2192  test('_objectSprites texture swaps on state transition and reverts to idle on return', async ({ page }) => {\n   401\u2192    test.setTimeout(30_000);\n   402\u2192\n   403\u2192    await injectSceneExposure(page);\n   404\u2192    await page.goto(LOCAL_URL);\n   405\u2192    await waitForEngine(page);\n   406\u2192    await page.waitForTimeout(500); // let Phaser create() complete\n   407\u2192\n   408\u2192    // \u2500\u2500 5a: Check initial textures \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   409\u2192    const initialTextures = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   410\u2192      const scene = window._gameScene;\n   411\u2192      return {\n   412\u2192        stove:     scene._objectSprites?.stove?.texture?.key,\n   413\u2192        tea_set:   scene._objectSprites?.tea_set?.texture?.key,\n   414\u2192        bookshelf: scene._objectSprites?.bookshelf?.texture?.key,\n   415\u2192        easel:     scene._objectSprites?.easel?.texture?.key,\n   416\u2192      };\n   417\u2192    });\n   418\u2192\n   419\u2192    console.log('Initial textures:', JSON.stringify(initialTextures));\n   420\u2192    expect(initialTextures.stove,     'stove initial texture').toBe('stove_off');\n   421\u2192    expect(initialTextures.tea_set,   'tea_set initial texture').toBe('cup_empty');\n   422\u2192    expect(initialTextures.bookshelf, 'bookshelf initial texture').toBe('book_closed');\n   423\u2192    expect(initialTextures.easel,     'easel initial texture').toBe('easel_blank');\n   424\u2192\n   425\u2192    // \u2500\u2500 5b: Trigger interact \u2192 cooking, push spriteKey event to pendingEvents \u2500\u2500\n   426\u2192    await page.evaluate(() => {\n   427\u2192      const engine = window._gameEngine;\n   428\u2192      // Interact with stove: idle \u2192 cooking\n   429\u2192      const ev = engine.objectEngine.interact('stove', 'use');\n   430\u2192      // Push the event so scene.update() picks it up on the next RAF\n   431\u2192      if (ev) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev);\n   432\u2192    });\n   433\u2192\n   434\u2192    // Wait for Phaser's RAF loop to call scene.update() and process pendingEvents\n   435\u2192    await page.waitForTimeout(500);\n   436\u2192\n   437\u2192    const afterCookingTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   438\u2192      const scene = window._gameScene;\n   439\u2192      return scene._objectSprites?.stove?.texture?.key;\n   440\u2192    });\n   441\u2192\n   442\u2192    console.log('Stove texture after idle\u2192cooking interact:', afterCookingTexture);\n   443\u2192    expect(afterCookingTexture,\n   444\u2192      'stove texture should be stove_on after transitioning to cooking'\n   445\u2192    ).toBe('stove_on');\n   446\u2192\n   447\u2192    // \u2500\u2500 5c: Auto-tick stove through done \u2192 idle, verify texture reverts \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   448\u2192    await page.evaluate(() => {\n   449\u2192      const engine = window._gameEngine;\n   450\u2192      const stove = engine.objectEngine.getById('stove');\n   451\u2192\n   452\u2192      // Fast-forward: cooking \u2192 done via auto timer\n   453\u2192      stove.autoTimer = 1;\n   454\u2192      const ev1 = stove.tick(100); // cooking \u2192 done (spriteKey: 'stove_on', same visual)\n   455\u2192      if (ev1?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev1);\n   456\u2192\n   457\u2192      // Fast-forward: done \u2192 idle via auto timer\n   458\u2192      stove.autoTimer = 1;\n   459\u2192      const ev2 = stove.tick(100); // done \u2192 idle (spriteKey: 'stove_off')\n   460\u2192      if (ev2?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev2);\n   461\u2192    });\n   462\u2192\n   463\u2192    // Wait for RAF to process both events\n   464\u2192    await page.waitForTimeout(500);\n   465\u2192\n   466\u2192    const afterIdleTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   467\u2192      const scene = window._gameScene;\n   468\u2192      return scene._objectSprites?.stove?.texture?.key;\n   469\u2192    });\n   470\u2192\n   471\u2192    console.log('Stove texture after returning to idle:', afterIdleTexture);\n   472\u2192    expect(afterIdleTexture,\n   473\u2192      'stove texture should revert to stove_off after returning to idle'\n   474\u2192    ).toBe('stove_off');\n   475\u2192\n   476\u2192    // \u2500\u2500 5d: Verify bookshelf swap (idle\u2192reading\u2192idle) \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n   477\u2192    await page.evaluate(() => {\n   478\u2192      const engine = window._gameEngine;\n   479\u2192      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');\n   480\u2192\n   481\u2192      // idle \u2192 reading\n   482\u2192      const ev1 = bookshelf.interact('use');\n   483\u2192      if (ev1?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev1);\n   484\u2192    });\n   485\u2192\n   486\u2192    await page.waitForTimeout(500);\n   487\u2192\n   488\u2192    const bookshelfReadingTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   489\u2192      const scene = window._gameScene;\n   490\u2192      return scene._objectSprites?.bookshelf?.texture?.key;\n   491\u2192    });\n   492\u2192\n   493\u2192    console.log('Bookshelf texture after idle\u2192reading:', bookshelfReadingTexture);\n   494\u2192    expect(bookshelfReadingTexture,\n   495\u2192      'bookshelf texture should be book_open after transitioning to reading'\n   496\u2192    ).toBe('book_open');\n   497\u2192\n   498\u2192    await page.evaluate(() => {\n   499\u2192      const engine = window._gameEngine;\n   500\u2192      const bookshelf = engine.objectEngine.getById('bookshelf');\n   501\u2192\n   502\u2192      // reading \u2192 idle via auto timer\n   503\u2192      bookshelf.autoTimer = 1;\n   504\u2192      const ev2 = bookshelf.tick(100);\n   505\u2192      if (ev2?.spriteKey) engine.pendingEvents.push(ev2);\n   506\u2192    });\n   507\u2192\n   508\u2192    await page.waitForTimeout(500);\n   509\u2192\n   510\u2192    const bookshelfIdleTexture = await page.evaluate(() => {\n   511\u2192      const scene = window._gameScene;\n   512\u2192      return scene._objectSprites?.bookshelf?.texture?.key;\n   513\u2192    });\n   514\u2192\n   515\u2192    console.log('Bookshelf texture after reading\u2192idle:', bookshelfIdleTexture);\n   516\u2192    expect(bookshelfIdleTexture,\n   517\u2192      'bookshelf texture should revert to book_closed after returning to idle'\n   518\u2192    ).toBe('book_closed');\n   519\u2192  });\n   520\u2192});\n   521\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
  }
}
ASSISTANTMESSAGE #24
Now I understand the existing test structure. I need to: 1. Clone the source repo (ai-aquarium-phaser) branch master into a sibling directory 2. Install dependencies and start the dev server 3. Write new tests for: - FRG-204: Walk-up animation using correct spritesheet row (frames 48-53, not 0-3) - FRG-244: Characters face toward each other during conversations (directional idle animations) - FRG-246: Object sprites actually change (stove_on.png is distinct from stove_off.png) Let me look at the existing tests more carefully to understand the patterns used. I also need to understand the specific bugs being fixed. Looking at the bug fixes, FRG-204 involved correcting the walk-up animation frames from the placeholder row to the proper row, and I need to verify the sprite displays correctly and animates smoothly in all directions. FRG-244 required adding directional idle animations so characters face each other during conversations instead of always facing down, and I need to test that behavior when two characters interact. For FRG-246, the stove sprite wasn't changing visually because both the on and off states used identical images, so I replaced the lit variant with a distinct one and should verify the file differences. Now I'm mapping out the test coverage: the walk animation tests need updating to specifically check the sprite row fix rather than the existing timer tests, I should add or update character-facing tests for the directional idle animations, and I need object sprite swap tests to confirm the stove visual change. I'm checking what ports the existing test files are using since they reference different localhost ports, and I need to figure out which port my dev server will run on when I start it fresh with the standard Vite setup. So the existing walk-animation tests cover the timer bug, but I need to write new tests specifically for the spritesheet row fix—verifying that walk-up uses the correct frames (48-53 instead of 0-3) and that characters display at normal size without glitches when moving in all directions. Looking at what's already in the codebase, I see tests for the object sprite swap and collision avoidance regressions, so I need to figure out which of the three visual bugs still need test coverage. I can see the existing regression tests cover walk animation frame cycling and character facing logic, but they don't validate the specific spritesheet rows for walk-up animations or the directional idle animation keys that the new bug fixes address. I need to write new test cases that verify the animation keys being selected match the expected directional variants. Now I need to figure out which port to use for testing the master branch. The existing tests are already using 5173, 5174, and 5176 for different features, and since we're cloning the source repo into a sibling directory and running it with Vite's default port, I should check if there's a pattern or configuration that determines which port to assign to this new test suite.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
  <title>AI Aquarium — Maple's Café</title>
  <style>
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: #1a1a2e; overflow: hidden; }
    canvas { image-rendering: pixelated; image-rendering: crisp-edges; display: block; }

    /* ── Debug toggle button ── */
    #debug-toggle {
      position: fixed;
      top: 10px;
      right: 10px;
      z-index: 100;
      padding: 4px 10px;
      background: #222240;
      color: #e0ddd4;
      border: 1px solid #444;
      border-radius: 3px;
      cursor: pointer;
      font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
      font-size: 11px;
      opacity: 0.75;
      transition: opacity 0.15s;
    }
    #debug-toggle:hover { opacity: 1; background: #2a2a5a; }
    #debug-toggle.open  { opacity: 1; border-color: #6a9a8a; color: #9eebd4; background: #1e2e3e; }

Let me look at the src/scene.js to understand the structure and see if it has window._gameEngine. Also, for a static site, I can serve it with `npx serve` or similar static file server. Or maybe I should use `npx http-server` or `python -m http.server`. But actually the task says to run `npm install && npm run dev` which implies there should be a package.json. Let me look more carefully at the git history to see if there's a package.json... Looking at the index.html, it seems to be pulling in Phaser and other dependencies through importmaps or a CDN, so I'll need to serve the static files with something like `npx http-server` and check how the modules are being loaded.

USERMESSAGE #67
✓ TOOL RESULT
SUCCESS 
     1→import { Character }         from './Character.js';
     2→import { SimulationEngine } from './Engine.js';
     3→import { AIEngine }          from './AIEngine.js';
     4→import { showSpeech }        from './speechBubble.js';
     5→import { OBJECT_DEFS }       from './objects.js';
     6→
     7→// ─── Constants ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     8→
     9→const TILE_SIZE  = 48;
    10→const GRID_COLS  = 19;
    11→const GRID_ROWS  = 13;
    12→
    13→// Walk spritesheet layout (2304×864, 48 cols × 9 rows, frame size 48×96)
    14→// Frame number = row * 48 + col.
    15→//   Row 0 → placeholder thumbnails (NOT usable — too small)
    16→//   Row 1 → up   (6 frames: 48–53)
    17→//   Row 3 → right (6 frames: 144–149)
    18→//   Row 6 → down  (6 frames: 288–293)
    19→// LEFT reuses the RIGHT frames with flipX applied at runtime.
    20→const WALK_DIRS = [
    21→  { key: 'up',    start:  48, end:  53 },
    22→  { key: 'down',  start: 288, end: 293 },
    23→  { key: 'right', start: 144, end: 149 },
    24→  { key: 'left',  start: 144, end: 149 }, // mirrored via flipX
    25→];
    26→
    27→// Character definitions — tile positions within walkable area (col 1–17, row 2–9)
    28→const CHARS = [
    29→  {
    30→    name: 'Amelia', label: 'Maple', tx: 6, ty: 7,
    31→    dialogue: ['Perfect brew today~', 'Want some tea?', 'The kitchen smells amazing'],
    32→  },
    33→  {
    34→    name: 'Lucy', label: 'Sol', tx: 10, ty: 6,
    35→    dialogue: ['The bonsai looks healthy', 'I should water the plants', 'Such peaceful light...'],
    36→  },
    37→  {
    38→    name: 'Ash', label: 'Nyx', tx: 13, ty: 5,
    39→    dialogue: ['I need more paint...', 'This light is perfect for sketching', 'Where did I put my brush?'],
    40→  },
    41→];
    42→
    43→// ─── Walkable grid ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    44→// 19 cols × 13 rows.
    45→// Interior floor (main room): cols 1–17, rows 2–9.
    46→// Rows 0–1 = roof/top wall; rows 10–12 = genkan / exterior — not walkable.
    47→
    48→function buildWalkableGrid() {
    49→  const grid = [];
    50→  for (let row = 0; row < GRID_ROWS; row++) {
    51→    const r = [];
    52→    for (let col = 0; col < GRID_COLS; col++) {
    53→      r.push(col >= 1 && col <= 17 && row >= 2 && row <= 9);
    54→    }
    55→    grid.push(r);
    56→  }
    57→  // Mark tiles occupied by objects as non-walkable
    58→  for (const def of OBJECT_DEFS) {
    59→    const { tx, ty } = def.position;
    60→    if (ty >= 0 && ty < GRID_ROWS && tx >= 0 && tx < GRID_COLS) {
    61→      grid[ty][tx] = false;
    62→    }
    63→  }
    64→  return grid;
    65→}
    66→
    67→// ─── Scene ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    68→
    69→export class CafeScene extends Phaser.Scene {
    70→  constructor() { super({ key: 'CafeScene' }); }
    71→
    72→  // ── Preload ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    73→
    74→  preload() {
    75→    this.load.image('jp', 'assets/designs/Japanese_Home_1_preview_48x48.png');
    76→
    77→    // Object state sprites (one image per visual state)
    78→    [
    79→      'stove_off', 'stove_on',
    80→      'book_closed', 'book_open',
    81→      'easel_blank', 'easel_painting', 'easel_finished',
    82→      'cup_empty', 'cup_full',
    83→    ].forEach(key => this.load.image(key, `assets/sprites/${key}.png`));
    84→
    85→    // Interaction animation types → spritesheets (48×96 frames, 6 frames each)
    86→    const INTERACT_ANIMS = ['reading_48x48', 'sit_48x48', 'sit2_48x48', 'phone_48x48'];
    87→
    88→    ['Amelia', 'Lucy', 'Ash'].forEach(name => {
    89→      this.load.spritesheet(`${name}_idle`, `assets/characters/${name}_idle.png`, {
    90→        frameWidth: 48, frameHeight: 96,
    91→      });
    92→      this.load.spritesheet(`${name}_walk`, `assets/characters/${name}_walk.png`, {
    93→        frameWidth: 48, frameHeight: 96,
    94→      });
    95→      INTERACT_ANIMS.forEach(anim => {
    96→        this.load.spritesheet(`${name}_${anim}`, `assets/characters/${name}_${anim}.png`, {
    97→          frameWidth: 48, frameHeight: 96,
    98→        });
    99→      });
   100→    });
   101→  }
   102→
   103→  // ── Create ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   104→
   105→  create() {
   106→    // Background
   107→    const img = this.add.image(0, 0, 'jp').setOrigin(0, 0);
   108→    this.cameras.main.setBounds(0, 0, img.width, img.height);
   109→    this.cameras.main.centerOn(img.width / 2, img.height / 2);
   110→
   111→    // Object state sprites — overlaid on the background tile, swapped on state transitions
   112→    // Objects with spriteMap: stove, tea_set, bookshelf, easel
   113→    this._objectSprites = {};
   114→    for (const def of OBJECT_DEFS) {
   115→      if (!def.spriteMap) continue;
   116→      const initKey = def.spriteMap[def.state] ?? null;
   117→      if (!initKey) continue;
   118→      const px = def.position.tx * TILE_SIZE;
   119→      const py = def.position.ty * TILE_SIZE;
   120→      this._objectSprites[def.id] = this.add.image(px, py, initKey)
   121→        .setOrigin(0, 0)
   122→        .setDepth(1);
   123→    }
   124→
   125→    // Interaction animation type → Phaser anim key suffix and spritesheet key suffix
   126→    const INTERACT_ANIM_DEFS = [
   127→      { type: 'reading', sheetKey: 'reading_48x48' },
   128→      { type: 'sit',     sheetKey: 'sit_48x48'     },
   129→      { type: 'sit2',    sheetKey: 'sit2_48x48'    },
   130→      { type: 'phone',   sheetKey: 'phone_48x48'   },
   131→    ];
   132→
   133→    // Animations
   134→    // Idle spritesheet layout: 24 frames (4 directions × 6 frames)
   135→    //   down  0–5, left 6–11, right 12–17, up 18–23
   136→    const IDLE_DIRS = [
   137→      { key: 'down',  start:  0, end:  5 },
   138→      { key: 'left',  start:  6, end: 11 },
   139→      { key: 'right', start: 12, end: 17 },
   140→      { key: 'up',    start: 18, end: 23 },
   141→    ];
   142→
   143→    ['Amelia', 'Lucy', 'Ash'].forEach(name => {
   144→      // Generic idle (backwards-compat, always faces down)
   145→      this.anims.create({
   146→        key: `${name}_idle_anim`,
   147→        frames: this.anims.generateFrameNumbers(`${name}_idle`, { start: 0, end: 5 }),
   148→        frameRate: 6,
   149→        repeat: -1,
   150→      });
   151→
   152→      // Directional idle animations
   153→      IDLE_DIRS.forEach(({ key, start, end }) => {
   154→        this.anims.create({
   155→          key: `${name}_idle_${key}`,
   156→          frames: this.anims.generateFrameNumbers(`${name}_idle`, { start, end }),
   157→          frameRate: 6,
   158→          repeat: -1,
   159→        });
   160→      });
   161→
   162→      WALK_DIRS.forEach(({ key, start, end }) => {
   163→        this.anims.create({
   164→          key: `${name}_walk_${key}`,
   165→          frames: this.anims.generateFrameNumbers(`${name}_walk`, { start, end }),
   166→          frameRate: 8,
   167→          repeat: -1,
   168→        });
   169→      });
   170→
   171→      // Interaction animations (6-frame loop, 6 fps)
   172→      INTERACT_ANIM_DEFS.forEach(({ type, sheetKey }) => {
   173→        this.anims.create({
   174→          key: `${name}_interact_${type}`,
   175→          frames: this.anims.generateFrameNumbers(`${name}_${sheetKey}`, { start: 0, end: 5 }),
   176→          frameRate: 6,
   177→          repeat: -1,
   178→        });
   179→      });
   180→    });
   181→
   182→    // Engine
   183→    const walkable = buildWalkableGrid();
   184→    this.engine = new SimulationEngine({
   185→      walkable,
   186→      gridCols: GRID_COLS,
   187→      gridRows: GRID_ROWS,
   188→      aiEngine: new AIEngine({
   189→        endpoint: '/api/llm',
   190→        model: 'anthropic/claude-3-haiku',
   191→        decisionIntervalMs: 30_000,
   192→      }),
   193→    });
   194→
   195→    // Characters
   196→    CHARS.forEach(({ name, label, tx, ty, dialogue }) => {
   197→      const initPx = tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;
   198→      const initPy = (ty + 1) * TILE_SIZE;
   199→
   200→      const sprite = this.add.sprite(initPx, initPy, `${name}_idle`)
   201→        .setOrigin(0.5, 1)
   202→        .setDepth(10);
   203→      sprite.play(`${name}_idle_anim`);
   204→
   205→      const nameLabel = this.add.text(initPx, initPy - 100, label, {
   206→        fontSize: '12px',
   207→        color: '#ffffff',
   208→        fontFamily: 'monospace',
   209→        stroke: '#000000',
   210→        strokeThickness: 2,
   211→      }).setOrigin(0.5, 1).setDepth(11);
   212→
   213→      const char = new Character({
   214→        name, label, tx, ty, sprite, nameLabel,
   215→        walkable, gridCols: GRID_COLS, gridRows: GRID_ROWS,
   216→        dialogue,
   217→      });
   218→
   219→      this.engine.addCharacter(char);
   220→    });
   221→
   222→    // Expose engine for the debug overlay panel
   223→    window._gameEngine = this.engine;
   224→
   225→    // Sim clock display (screen-fixed, top-left)
   226→    this.clockText = this.add.text(8, 8, '', {
   227→      fontSize: '13px',
   228→      color: '#ffe8a3',
   229→      fontFamily: 'monospace',
   230→      stroke: '#000000',
   231→      strokeThickness: 2,
   232→    }).setDepth(20).setScrollFactor(0);
   233→  }
   234→
   235→  // ── Update ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   236→
   237→  update(_time, delta) {
   238→    this.engine.update(delta);
   239→    this.clockText.setText(this.engine.getSimTimeString());
   240→
   241→    // Show speech bubbles queued by the engine
   242→    for (const char of this.engine.characters) {
   243→      if (char.pendingSpeech && char.sprite) {
   244→        showSpeech(this, char.sprite, char.pendingSpeech);
   245→        char.pendingSpeech = null;
   246→      }
   247→    }
   248→
   249→    // Process object state-transition events: swap sprites and float emojis
   250→    if (this.engine.pendingEvents.length > 0) {
   251→      for (const ev of this.engine.pendingEvents) {
   252→        const obj = this.engine.objectEngine.getById(ev.objectId);
   253→        if (!obj) continue;
   254→
   255→        // Swap object sprite texture on state change
   256→        if (ev.spriteKey && this._objectSprites[ev.objectId]) {
   257→          this._objectSprites[ev.objectId].setTexture(ev.spriteKey);
   258→        }
   259→
   260→        // Float emoji above the object
   261→        if (ev.emoji) {
   262→          const px = obj.tx * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;
   263→          const py = obj.ty * TILE_SIZE;
   264→          const label = this.add.text(px, py, ev.emoji, { fontSize: '24px' }).setDepth(25);
   265→          this.tweens.add({
   266→            targets: label,
   267→            y:       label.y - 40,
   268→            alpha:   0,
   269→            duration: 2000,
   270→            onComplete: () => label.destroy(),
   271→          });
   272→        }
   273→      }
   274→      this.engine.pendingEvents = [];
   275→    }
   276→  }
   277→}
   278→
